/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/Ledger.dir/Ledger_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ledger.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ledger.dir/core/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ledger.dir/core/trade.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ledger.dir/core/stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ledger.dir/ui/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ledger.dir/ui/addtradedialog.cpp.o -o Ledger  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Sql.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.2.4
